raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "California faces a shortage of up to 2 million homes, driving the median price above $800,000.",
    "AB 317 aims to boost affordable housing production by eliminating unnecessary regulatory delays.",
    "AB 317 creates a targeted exemption from the California Environmental Quality Act (CEQA) for modest, first-time homebuyer developments.",
    "The legislation applies to homes 1,500 square feet or less, with no more than three bedrooms, priced under $400,000, and built specifically for first-time buyers.",
    "By streamlining the approval process for these homes, AB 317 aims to increase supply and reduce costs for working families."
  ]
}
```
